title: Linkind MR16 LED Bulbs, Dimmable GU5.3 Light Bulb, 12 Volt Spotlights Ceiling Lights, 2 Pin, 5.5W Equivalent to 50W Halogen, Warm White 2700K, 465LM, 5 Pack
features: ✔️[10%-100% Dimmable LED Bulbs] - Dimmable GU5.3 led light bulbs compatible with most LED dimmer switches,dim range 10% -100%. Note: ONLY works with 12V AC/DC low voltage. GU5.3 LED bulbs could flicker or cannot be dimed if used with halogen transformer(has load limit).
✔️[90% Energy Saving Light Bulbs] - 12v 5.5W GU5.3 LED bulbreplace 50W halogen bulbs compatible . Save over 90% electricity cost.Standard GU5.3 base, 5.3mm between 2 pins, 50mm diameter.

✔️[36-Degree Spot Lights] - Dimmable MR16 LED bulb features 36° angle and light output of 465lm, emits cozy 2700K warm white light through frosted reflector free from glare and flicker. Ideal for living room, kitchen, bedroom, hotels etc.
✔️[25000hrs Long Life] - CE & ERP certified with assured quality, long life of 25000hrs, 10 years longer than traditional lamp at 3 hours / day, reducing the frequency of re-lamping.
✔️[High CRI> 80] - With a CRI above 80, you get vivid visual pleasure for your eyes. No mercury or lead, and no UV or IR.
description: Product Description Purchase Notes: Previous page Next page 1 LED transformer required 2 GU5.3 Bi-Pin Base Socket Type GU5.3 Bi-Pin Base Compatible Voltage 12V (LED transformer required) Dimmable Range 10%-100% Light Color 2700K Warm white Size Diameter:5cm Height:4.9cm Brightness 465lm Suitable Applications 465 lumens is ideal for focused task lighting with a single bulb in desk lamps or under-cabinet lights, and creates elegant decorative effects in pendant or track lighting when used in multiples.
